content.text:
[cron:74870ca0-3164-4c7a-ac43-02cac1b4034e Godot下载监控] 检查 Godot 下载状态。如果未安装成功，继续尝试下载 Godot 4.x Linux 版本。使用 wget 或 curl 从官网或镜像下载，每10分钟重试直到成功。下载成功后解压到 /tmp/ 并验证可执行。
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 8:09 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command: which godot || ls -la /tmp/godot* 2>/dev/null || echo "Godot not found in PATH or /tmp"

content.text: 网络连接正常。尝试使用更长的超时时间和后台下载：

arguments.command:
cd /tmp && rm -f godot_linux.zip && nohup curl -L --connect-timeout 60 --max-time 300 -o godot_linux.zip "https://downloads.tuxfamily.org/godotengine/4.3/Godot_v4.3-stable_linux.x86_64.zip" > /tmp/godot_download.log 2>&1 &
echo "Download started in background, PID: $!"
sleep 2
ps aux | grep curl | grep -v grep

content.text: 系统已有 Godot 3.5.2，但我们需要 Godot 4.x。尝试通过 snap 安装：

details.error:
/usr/bin/bash: line 1: snap: command not found

Command exited with code 127

content.text: 尝试使用 conda 或 pip 安装：

arguments.command: which pip3 && pip3 search godot 2>&1 || echo "pip search not available"
